name: Application Whitelisting Bypass via PresentationHost
description: Detects the use of `presentationhost.exe` to bypass application whitelisting and execute malicious XAML Browser Application (XBAP) files.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'presentationhost.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the presentationhost.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute presentationhost.exe, including an XBAP file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which presentationhost.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
